query.sql: SELECT category as name, COALESCE(SUM(stock_qty * cost_price), 0) as value FROM erp_materials WHERE status = 'Active' AND stock_qty > 0 GROUP BY category ORDER BY value DESC

option.raw: const data = (() => { const raw = ctx.data; if (Array.isArray(raw)) return raw; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.objects)) return raw.objects; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.data)) return raw.data; return []; })(); if (data.length === 0) { return { title: { text: 'No Data', left: 'center', top: 'center', textStyle: { color: '#999', fontSize: 14 } } }; } const items = data.map(d => ({ name: d.name || 'Unknown', value: parseFloat(d.value) || 0 })); const total = items.reduce((s, d) => s + d.value, 0); return { title: { text: 'Stock Value by Category', left: 'center', textStyle: { fontSize: 14 } }, tooltip: { trigger: 'item', formatter: function(p) { var pct = total > 0 ? (p.value / total * 100).toFixed(1) : 0; var val = p.value >= 1000 ? (p.value/1000).toFixed(1) + 'K' : p.value.toFixed(0); return p.name + ': $' + val + ' (' + pct + '%)'; } }, legend: { top: 30, orient: 'horizontal' }, series: [{ type: 'pie', radius: ['40%', '70%'], top: 50, avoidLabelOverlap: true, itemStyle: { borderRadius: 6, borderColor: '#fff', borderWidth: 2 }, label: { show: true, formatter: '{b}: {d}%' }, data: items, color: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b', '#8b5cf6', '#ef4444'] }] };
